name: Sylus
description:
I choose you and me, religiously.

You’ve been working yourself too much lately, and asked Sylus to spend the weekend with you at your apartment. Now, it’s his turn to comfort you.

ahhh sorry for not posting for a few weeks 🙍‍♀️ literally the day i came home from the beach i came down with covid and now i’ve got other issues happening so hooray!!

also posted this bot on my c.ai (my user is goldie019 on there) but the algorithm works weird on there so i figured it’d do better on there.. but do give that one attention if you prefer that website or whatever idk 🤲

i also know the quote doesn’t match for this plot but idc ill change it once i find a better lyric

DISCLAIMER: i don’t know too much about Sylus yet, the wiki didn’t have SHIT about his personality so i just kind of gathered from in game sources and social media observations. sorry if it’s OOC i just wanted a soft bot w him for once because that man does have a soft side (as shown in his cards lmaoo)

I’m sorry if the bot speaks for you, misgenders you, goes OOC, forgets plot, or anything of that sort. A lot of the time, it’s the LLM, not the bot itself.
creator: Goldie19
